title: CoolerModulePDD
description: JSON Schema for the cooler module fields required by the Verra VM0009 v3.0 kiln PDD. Owner: James Okafor (carbon-markets-expert). Methodology: Verra VM0009 v3.0 (2023-Q4). Registry: Verra VCS Program Guide v4.5 (2024-Q2). Generated: 2026-07-22.

meta.description: Provenance and audit-trail block. Verra VCS Program Guide v4.5 §3.6 (PDD completion).

pdd_schema_version.description: Version of this PDD JSON schema. Bump on backward-incompatible changes.

generator_version.description: Version of the nepal_cooler_sim package that generated this PDD JSON.

generated_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at which the PDD JSON was generated.

sha256_of_inputs.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonicalised input parameters, for audit-trail integrity.

project_description.description: PDD §A.1–A.4 (Project Description). Verra VCS Program Guide v4.5 §3.1.

plant_name.description: Plant name as registered. Example: 'Hetauda Cement Industries Ltd (HCIL) Line 2'.

altitude_m.description: Plant altitude above sea level in metres. Cengel & Boles 2015 (ISA barometric). Hetauda = 1400 m.

clinker_capacity_tpd.description: Nameplate clinker capacity in tonnes per day. Hetauda 130 t/h ≈ 3120 tpd.

cooler_technology.description: Cooler type. 'grate' is the dominant technology for modern Nepali / Indian plants.

cooler_n_compartments.description: Number of compartments in the grate cooler. Default 5 (IKN/Polycom/Hongshi). Peray & Waddell 1986 §6.4.

cooler_manufacturer.description: Cooler OEM. Free-text. Examples: 'IKN Pyrorotor', 'KHD Pyrostep', 'Polysius REPOL'.

baseline.description: PDD §B.1–B.5 (Baseline Determination). Verra VM0009 v3.0 §5.2–5.3. All values are HISTORICAL (3-year average pre-project) from operator DCS export, NOT modeled.

cooler_efficiency.description: Baseline cooler heat-recovery efficiency as a fraction. Typical Nepali / Indian baseline: 0.65–0.72. GCCA GNR 2022; ECRA 2022. BAT: 0.75–0.80.

secondary_air_outlet_c.description: Baseline secondary-air temperature in °C (3-year historical average). Peray & Waddell 1986 §6.4.

secondary_air_mass_flow_kg_s.description: Baseline secondary-air mass flow in kg/s (3-year historical average). For 130 t/h clinker, ~38 kg/s at 1.05–1.15× stoich. Peray & Waddell 1986 §6.2.

clinker_outlet_c.description: Baseline clinker-outlet temperature in °C (3-year historical). ECRA 2022 BAT < 100 °C above ambient; typical 150–250 °C.

coal_flow_kg_s.description: Baseline kiln-coal mass flow in kg/s (3-year historical). Used in the kiln baseline equation. VM0009 v3.0 §5.3.

project.description: PDD §C.1–C.5 (Project Scenario). Verra VM0009 v3.0 §5.3 + §6.2. Frequency: continuous (1-min average, 1-h logged, daily reported, monthly aggregated).

cooler_efficiency.description: Project cooler heat-recovery efficiency as a fraction (daily computed). Ship-gate: 0.65–0.85. GCCA GNR 2022; ECRA 2022.

secondary_air_outlet_c.description: Project secondary-air temperature in °C. Ship-gate: 600–1000 °C at Hetauda. Peray & Waddell 1986 §6.4.

secondary_air_outlet_k.description: Project secondary-air temperature in Kelvin (= secondary_air_outlet_c + 273.15). The kiln model takes Kelvin. VM0009 v3.0 §5.3.

secondary_air_mass_flow_kg_s.description: Project secondary-air mass flow in kg/s. For 130 t/h clinker, default 38 kg/s at 1.05–1.15× stoich. Peray & Waddell 1986 §6.2.

tertiary_air_outlet_c.description: Project tertiary-air temperature in °C (compartments 2..N-1 flow-weighted mean). Ship-gate: 400–700 °C. Peray & Waddell 1986 §6.4.

exhaust_air_outlet_c.description: Project exhaust-air temperature in °C (compartment N). Ship-gate: 150–300 °C. Peray & Waddell 1986 §6.4.

clinker_outlet_c.description: Project clinker-outlet temperature in °C. Ship-gate: 120–200 °C (target 150 ± 30). ECRA 2022.

bed_pressure_drop_mm_h2o.description: Project under-grate bed pressure drop in mm H₂O. First compartment 50–80, last 25–40 mm H₂O. Peray & Waddell 1986 §6.4.

fan_power_kw.description: Project total cooler fan power in kW. KHD Pyrostep benchmark: 8–12 kW per t/h of clinker. For 130 t/h Hetauda, ~1000–1500 kW total.

secondary_air_recovered_kw.description: Project heat recovered in secondary air in kW. Must match clinker-side heat recovered within 2 % (first-law balance). VM0009 v3.0 §6.2.

secondary_air_recovered_gj_per_t_clinker.description: Project specific secondary-air heat recovery in GJ/t-cli. Peray & Waddell 1986 §6.4 benchmark: 0.30–0.45.

first_law_imbalance.description: First-law energy balance residual as a fraction of Q_in. Ship-gate: ≤ 0.02. VM0009 v3.0 §6.2.

cooler_loss_mj_per_t_cli.description: Project total cooler heat loss in MJ/t-cli. ECRA 2022 BAT ceiling: 0.42 MJ/kg-cli = 420 MJ/t-cli.

monitoring.description: PDD §D.1–D.6 (Monitoring Plan). Verra VM0009 v3.0 §6.2 + ISO 14064-2 §5.7.

instrument_cooler_outlet_T.description: Instrument description for cooler-outlet T. e.g. 'Type-K thermocouple, class 1, 0-1100 °C, shielded'.

uncertainty_cooler_outlet_T.description: Expanded uncertainty (k=2) of cooler-outlet T in K. Typical ±10 K at 800 °C for Type-K class 1.

calibration_frequency_cooler_outlet_T.description: Calibration frequency. e.g. 'quarterly single-point against NIST-traceable portable TC; annual re-cal'.

instrument_secondary_air_flow.description: Instrument description for secondary-air flow. e.g. 'orifice plate per ISO 5167' or 'thermal mass flowmeter'.

uncertainty_secondary_air_flow.description: Relative expanded uncertainty (k=2) of secondary-air flow as a fraction. Typical ±0.02 (2 % of reading).

data_custodian.description: Owner of the monitoring data. e.g. 'Plant DCS / control room; daily export to MRV database'.

qa_qc_procedure.description: Reference to QA/QC procedure. e.g. 'see data_quality_spec.md (Kabita, env-eng-permitting); ISO 14064-2 §5.7'.

frequency_data_logging.description: Data logging and reporting cadence. e.g. '1-min average, 1-h logged, daily reported, monthly aggregated'.

sanity.description: Sanity / diagnostic block (NOT in the PDD directly; present in monitoring_report.json). A red flag here triggers a verification site visit.

air_above_clinker.description: False = second-law invariant satisfied. True = violation. Mujumdar 2007 §3.1.

first_law_imbalance.description: First-law imbalance as a fraction. ≤ 0.02 passes. VM0009 v3.0 §6.2.

sec_air_in_realistic_band.description: True if secondary_air_outlet_c ∈ [600, 1000] °C for default Hetauda preset. Peray & Waddell 1986 §6.4.

duty_case.description: Nepal duty-case block (mandatory for HCIL / UCIL plants). Cengel & Boles 2015; HCIL plant documents. Verra VCS Program Guide v4.5 §3.1 (operating conditions must be stated).

altitude_m.description: Plant altitude in metres. Hetauda = 1400; Udayapur ≈ 300.

ambient_t_c.description: Ambient design-day temperature in °C. Hetauda May design day = 35 °C.

ambient_rh.description: Ambient design-day relative humidity as a fraction. Hetauda monsoon = 0.90.

air_density_kg_m3.description: Computed moist-air density at altitude / T / RH in kg/m³. Hetauda (1400 m, 35 °C, 90 % RH) ≈ 1.05. Cengel & Boles 2015. The v0.3.0 hard-coded 0.6 kg/m³ is wrong at any altitude < 3500 m — Ramesh's §5.1 fix.

p_atm_mbar.description: Barometric pressure in mbar. Hetauda ≈ 858 mbar. ISA barometric formula.

design_mcr_pct.description: Maximum continuous rating design point as a percentage. Typically 100 % MCR. Per ASME PTC 38.

note.description: Free-text note on the duty case. e.g. 'Hetauda May design day; air density at 1400 m / 35 °C / 90 % RH'.
